motion.HOOK: A slow push through the dark toward the glowing subject as it ignites
motion.INTUITION: A drift around the familiar view, light grazing the surface
motion.REVEAL: The camera pulls to reveal the mechanism — scale opening up in the void
motion.DETAIL: A slow macro push onto the one luminous detail, bloom flaring
motion.WHY: A grand pull-back to a wide, the subject small against the cosmos
motion.CTA: A gentle drift back into the dark, the light receding to invite a replay

brand.palette: near-black space void, deep indigo and teal nebula haze, with ONE luminous accent (electric cyan or warm star-gold) and crisp specular highlights; dramatic, high-contrast, never flat or grey
brand.marks: none baked in — the light IS the mark. A faint lens-bloom or a thin ring of light is the only recurring motif. NO logos, NO 3D badges, NO text baked in

description: cinematic deep-space — inky blacks, volumetric light, one glowing subject
world: a cinematic deep-space / astrophysics world — a single hero subject (a planet, a photon, a molecule, a wave) suspended in an inky void, lit by one directional source with volumetric god-rays and soft nebula haze, rendered like a premium science documentary or a high-end CGI simulation
style: Cinematic 3D / astrophotography look — deep true-black background, one dramatic directional key light, volumetric light shafts, subtle lens bloom and depth of field, an electric-cyan or star-gold accent against cool indigo-teal haze. Awe-inducing, IMAX-scale, physically plausible; NOT flat, NOT cartoonish, NOT a bright daylight scene. Vertical 9:16 with the luminous subject in the upper two thirds and the lower third falling to clean darkness for captions.
name: cosmos
